name: Beijing Jiaoda Signal Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Jiaoda Signal Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells railway transportation security devices in China. The company offers balise transmission modules (BTM), track circuit readers, lineside electronic units, balise telegram programmers, transparent data loop, and transparent data and fixed data balise products; on-board cab signaling equipment, track circuit readers, cab signaling plugin boards for railcar, and digital general cab signaling equipment; and onboard cab signaling data recorders, BTM recorders, remote monitoring systems, and telegram encoding systems. Its products are used in railway, urban transit, and other projects. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Beijing, China.
